_readme: Signal patterns for the classify-message hook. Each signal scans user messages and injects routing hints into Claude's context. Edit patterns[] to match your language and workflow. Add new signals following the same shape. No code changes needed — just edit this file.

signals.name: DECISION
signals.message: DECISION detected — consider logging in [[🧠 Brain/Decisions.md]] and creating a decision record note in the relevant project

signals.name: WIN
signals.message: WIN detected — consider adding to [[🧠 Brain/Memory.md]] active context and the relevant project note

signals.name: PERSON_CONTEXT
signals.message: PERSON CONTEXT detected — consider updating the relevant [[👤 People/]] profile (Interaction Log + Active Items)

signals.name: PROJECT_UPDATE
signals.message: PROJECT UPDATE detected — consider updating the relevant note in [[🚀 Projects/]] and [[🧠 Brain/Memory.md]] if status changed

signals.name: MEETING
signals.message: MEETING CONTENT detected — consider creating a meeting note in [[🚀 Projects/<project>/Meetings/]] or [[🤝 Meetings/]] if orphan

signals.name: IDEA
signals.message: IDEA detected — consider capturing in [[💡 Ideas/]] before it gets lost
